Cucumber Salads

author: Janet Caldwell

Prep time ->

Cook time ->

Yield:

Ingredients

  • 8oz sour cream
  • ¼ c lemon juice
  • 2-3 Tbsp sugar
  • 1 tsp salt
  • ½ tsp dill weed
  • 1 cucumber, seeded and sliced
  • 1 sweet white onion, sliced

Directions

  1. Combine sour cream, lemon juice, sugar, salt and dill weed. Mix well. Add cucumber and onion.
  2. Cover and chill.

Makes 3 cups.
